name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new module, feature, or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement

---

## Summary
A brief description of the feature.

## Problem it Solves
What governance gap or UX issue does this address?

## Proposed Solution
How should this be implemented?

## Module Affected
Which module(s) would this change? (Dashboard / Risk Register / Vendors / etc.)
